creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
For databases/tarantool, the libev error can be fixed easily by adding:

USE_CSTD=      c99

or by following amdmi3's suggestion.  However, the rest of the port does not compile with previous versions of clang either (I tried 3.4.1 and 3.5.1):

/usr/work/share/dim/ports/databases/tarantool/work/tarantool-1.5.3-102-g2857a4e-src/third_party/coro/coro.c:124:8: error: expected parameter declarator
       "\t.text\n"
       ^
/usr/work/share/dim/ports/databases/tarantool/work/tarantool-1.5.3-102-g2857a4e-src/third_party/coro/coro.c:124:8: error: expected ')'
/usr/work/share/dim/ports/databases/tarantool/work/tarantool-1.5.3-102-g2857a4e-src/third_party/coro/coro.c:123:7: note: to match this '('
  asm (
      ^
/usr/work/share/dim/ports/databases/tarantool/work/tarantool-1.5.3-102-g2857a4e-src/third_party/coro/coro.c:123:3: warning: type specifier missing, defaults to 'int' [-Wimplicit-int]
  asm (
  ^~~      

E.g., it is attempting to use top-level asm routines, which have never been supported, as far as I know.
